message:
test(resize_scheduler): expand proptest from 2 to 18 properties (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New properties cover: config/intent/domain/work-class serde roundtrips,
monotonic submission enforcement, single-flight-per-pane guarantee,
snapshot count consistency, emergency disable suppression, quiescence
draining, lifecycle event_seq monotonicity, domain key determinism,
budget bounded scheduling, no duplicate pane IDs, metrics frame counter
monotonicity, and debug snapshot serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
